subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! The morn of reunion hath been shrouded in veils, and the night of separation hath been prolonged. The promise of reunion hath been abrogated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی صبح وصلت احتجاب ایتمش و لیل فرقت امتداد ایتمش ایت وصال منسوخ اولدی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution
